name: ln
description: Create (default hard) symbolic links to files

options.name: -F
options.description: If link name already exists replace it

options.name: -f
options.description: If link name already exists unlink the old one before creating the new one

options.name: -i
options.description: Prompt if proposed link already exists

options.name: -n
options.description: Same as -h don't follow symbolic links
